title: Local SEO GBP Audit Starter
exact_acceptance_statement: I accept the Local SEO / GBP Audit fixed-scope terms at $175. I understand work starts only after seller-owned external payment proof exists; I will provide only public or buyer-authorized non-sensitive business details; the audit is limited to public website/profile review, category/citation/review/landing-page observations, and a prioritized action checklist; and Google account login work, profile claiming/verification, fake reviews, paid ads, legal advice, publishing edits, ongoing SEO, or extra revisions are not included unless separately agreed before payment.
allowed_inputs: Business name, public website, Google Business Profile URL if available, target city/service area, and 1-3 priority services. Do not send account credentials.
paid_deliverable: One local SEO / GBP audit covering profile completeness, category fit, review/citation gaps, landing-page fit, and a prioritized next-action checklist.
acceptance_gate: Buyer confirms the business URL/profile, target market, fixed scope, delivery format, and a $175 payment route before custom analysis starts.
proof_rule: Count $0 unless a real buyer accepts scope, pays through a user-controlled route, receives delivery, and payment is posted/released/payable/cleared.
money_counting_rule: Release downloads count $0. Count only externally posted, released, payable, or cleared payment after buyer acceptance and delivery.

title: PDF Table Extraction Starter
exact_acceptance_statement: I accept the PDF/Table Extraction fixed-scope terms at $125. I understand work starts only after seller-owned external payment proof exists; I will provide only public or buyer-owned/buyer-authorized non-sensitive documents through an approved channel; the deliverable is limited to extracted CSV/XLSX output, ambiguity notes, and a repeatable extraction checklist for the accepted sample; and confidential regulated data handling, OCR of large batches, custom software implementation, credential/account access, ongoing support, or extra revisions are not included unless separately agreed before payment.
allowed_inputs: One buyer-owned or public PDF sample, target table fields, desired CSV column names, and any redaction requirements. Do not send private financial, medical, identity, or confidential records unless authorized.
paid_deliverable: Extracted CSV from the approved PDF/table sample, notes on ambiguous rows, and a repeatable extraction checklist.
acceptance_gate: Buyer confirms file rights, table scope, output columns, deadline, and a $125 payment route before extraction starts.
proof_rule: Count $0 unless a real buyer accepts scope, pays through a user-controlled route, receives delivery, and payment is posted/released/payable/cleared.
money_counting_rule: Release downloads count $0. Count only externally posted, released, payable, or cleared payment after buyer acceptance and delivery.
